problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
hypothesis: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Quantum. Quantum tunneling through energy barrier directly addresses this.
